summary: Tested new features: logo in header/footer, scroll-reveal animations, and contact form (POST /api/contact). All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Submitted a test contact via contact form (playwright) and via backend test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: logos render in header & footer (correct URL), 14 scroll-reveal elements present with Intersection Observer triggering correctly (3 revealed after scroll to 800px), contact form renders all 4 fields (name/email/service dropdown/message), form submits to /api/contact and shows success message, FAQ accordion visible, Instagram link opens _blank. Backend: all 5 tests pass.

frontend.contact_form_fields: PASS - name, email, service, message all present
frontend.scroll_reveal_css: PASS - CSS rules present, 14 elements, 3 revealed after scroll
